---
applyTo: "src/api/**"
---

# Backend Development Instructions

Critical HIGH-severity rules (must never be violated) and the mandatory self-validation checklist:

- [critical-rules.instructions.md](critical-rules.instructions.md)

Avoid checking files with <auto-generated> tag in the first line, as they are generated by tools and should not be modified manually.

For architecture and layer responsibilities, see architecture.instructions.md.

---

# Technology Stack

- ASP.NET Core
- C# 12+
- Entity Framework Core (via repositories only)
- Domain Driven Design
- Provider / Repository pattern
- Unit of Work pattern

---

# Code Standards

All backend code must follow:

- /docs/rules/01-architecture.md
- /docs/rules/02-coding-standards.md
- /docs/rules/03-patterns.md
- /docs/rules/04-ddd.md

Additionally, ensure these HIGH-severity rule areas are not violated in new/modified code:

- Exception handling must use the centralized pipeline (PAT-007)
- Dependency injection only; avoid service-locator/manual instantiation (ARCH-007)
- No reflection, no `dynamic`, no blocking async calls (CS-007, CS-009, CS-010)
- JSON serialization must use generated `JsonSerializerContext` (CS-008)

---

# Domain-Driven Design

Entities must encapsulate behavior:

- Use private setters
- Expose domain methods for state changes
- Enforce business invariants inside the entity
- Avoid public mutable state
- Do not use entities as DTOs

Value Objects:

- Must be immutable
- Prefer `record` types
- Validate in constructors
- Override equality

---

# Repository Pattern

Repositories abstract data access:

- One repository per aggregate root
- Return domain entities, not DTOs
- Accept domain entities, not DTOs
- Use async methods
- Must not contain business logic

---

# Provider Pattern

Providers coordinate application workflows:

- Orchestrate multiple repositories
- Manage Unit of Work transactions
- Transform entities to/from DTOs
- Must not contain domain business rules

---

# Separation Boundaries

Never generate database schema changes in backend code.

Database changes must be placed under `src/database`.

Before returning code, run the **Mandatory Self-Validation** checklist in [critical-rules.instructions.md](critical-rules.instructions.md).
